title: Classic End Phantom Reborn
description: The original 18w07a Phantom textures on the new model.
body:
This pack takes the original 18w07a Phantom that used to spawn in the End and edits it's old texture to fit on the new model. A perfect fit for mods / datapacks that move Phantoms to the End Dimension. Making the Phantom tricky to spot against the night / end sky if not for the much larger glowing green eyes.

This pack should be compatible with just about every version of Minecraft.
